title: Looking for a specialist for a more complicated board build out
excerpt: Hi, we are a Indiana based wealth management firm that is looking to get some help building out a complex board. We are only a small team of 5 but we work with some complicated information.  Please let me know if you can…

posts.author: midwestwealth1 (David Thyen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we are a Indiana based wealth management firm that is looking to get some help building out a complex board. We are only a small team of 5 but we work with some complicated information. Please let me know if you can help!

posts.author: plyngdal (Peter Lyngdal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David,

My name is Peter Lyngdal and I work for a consulting firm in Minneapolis on Monday.com enhancements. Would love to connect and understand your needs! Please reach out and we can find a time to talk this week: plyngdal@mmcmsp.com

Best,
Peter Lyngdal
